<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Exception; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> */ class ThrowingCasterException extends \Exception { /** * @param \Throwable $prev The exception thrown from the caster */ public function __construct(\Throwable $prev) { parent::__construct('Unexpected '.$prev::class.' thrown from a caster: '.$prev->getMessage(), 0, $prev); } }
